| -- | ---- | ------ | ------ | ---- | ---------- | ----- |
| [0001](./0001/) | core | draft | minor | not-started | 2026-05-25 — Experiment 11-cross-catalog-import concluded — hypothesis held. Two parallel cue.mod/ setups (per locked planning choice): both_subscribed/ holds catalog_a + catalog_b; b_missing/ holds catalog_a only. Both-catalogs-present: standard CUE import resolves; catalog_a's transformer materializes catalog_b's #BarResource into requiredResources keyed by B's concrete FQN test.example/b/resources/bar@1.0.0; vet clean (plain and -c). Catalog_b-absent: CUE evaluation fails with 'cannot find package' naming both the offending import line (foo_transformer.cue:12:2) and the file that triggered resolution (catalog.cue:9:2) — exactly the failure shape the kernel wraps as MaterializeError per 06-operational.md. Honest gap acknowledged in experiment README: pure CUE cannot express the platform subscription set without the kernel; physical absence is the closest proxy and produces a CUE error shape matching what the kernel would surface. D16 Source line gained experiment citation. Schema-side learning surfaced during fixture authoring: `#PrimitiveMetadata` needs `description?: string` directly (not added via intersection `& {description!: string}` in `#ComponentTransformer`) — the intersection approach fails 'field not allowed' for definition-wrapped transformer values; the production target.cue already uses the direct-field form, experiment schema now mirrors it. | #Platform Redesign Umbrella |

## Status legend

- **draft** — initial design, actively being written
- **accepted** — design agreed upon, ready for implementation
- **implemented** — design has been realized in code
- **superseded** — replaced by a newer enhancement (see `superseded_by` in the entry's config.yaml)
